source_surface: live implementation session and target baseline
question: Parent closeout gate verified after W1449 and issue-ledger installation: implementation rollout quiescent, target worktree clean, and Issues/ installed.
expected_artifact: parent result.json with git HEAD, worktree status, implementation-session activity classification, terminal_outcome git_head, verification git_head, and launch decision
acceptance_gate: Parent can decide install-now, wait-for-clean, or mark all active support rows stale_rebase_needed; no worker launches before this row is parent_verified
stale_rule: Stale immediately after any non-Issues target source/proof commit, dirty worktree change outside Issues, or new implementation rollout activity
implementation_consumption: No proof advice; parent may launch support workers from this verified baseline

source_surface: W1449 terminal outcome and final false witness
question: Confirm W1449 still cannot be misread as product success, and classify the terminal_outcome git_head mismatch against live HEAD.
expected_artifact: result.json with exact checks over terminal_outcome, run/verification, productSuccess true scan, final false witness scan, metadata freshness classification, and negative-fixture implications
acceptance_gate: All checks prove product_success=false or fail in the expected way; any product-success contradiction becomes a blocker row
stale_rule: Reopen on terminal_outcome regeneration, non-Issues target source/proof commit, or W1449+ closeout
implementation_consumption: Audit-only false-completion guard added to accepted_for_impl; no proof integration

question: Decide whether W1449 is meaningful frontier movement or another rewrap cycle; list route hashes that should not be resampled.
expected_artifact: result.json with route_hashes, duplicate/cycle classification, rejected_routes, proof_search_cache rows, and one concrete next proof-route decision
acceptance_gate: Parent can append cache rows that prevent at least one duplicate wrapper, rewrap, or packaging route from being sampled again
stale_rule: Reopen if W1447-W1449 route files or proof baseline change
implementation_consumption: Audit-only cache decision added to proof_search_cache and accepted_for_impl; no proof integration

source_surface: W987/W988/W989 provider surface and related local declarations
question: Find existing local or mathlib declarations that could replace the routed provider surface with actual constructions satisfying the positive-witness supplement.
expected_artifact: result.json with exact declaration names, import paths, minimal Lean snippets, unsupported names, and hallucination rejects
acceptance_gate: Parent can rerun a named Lean command or reject with an exact missing declaration; no prose-only acceptance
stale_rule: Reopen if API imports, W987/W1007 provider definitions, or proof baseline changes
implementation_consumption: Audit-only API frontier note added to accepted_for_impl; no proof integration

question: Target-side Issues installation completed as an issue-ledger operational change; keep future ledger edits separate from Lean proof increments.
expected_artifact: target commit creating Issues/README.md and Issues/support_issues.tsv only
acceptance_gate: Installed commit contains only Issues/README.md and Issues/support_issues.tsv and does not modify Lean proof files
stale_rule: Reopen only if target Issues directory is removed or the local Issues approach is rejected
implementation_consumption: Installed as operational ledger; no proof integration

source_surface: W1270-W1449 repeated wrapper and provider packaging history
question: Convert repeated wrapper, field-split, and provider-packaging history into cache rows so support workers stop rediscovering known non-reducing routes.
expected_artifact: proof_search_cache.tsv draft plus result.json with source evidence and omitted-large-body policy
acceptance_gate: Cache rows include route_id, route_hash, result_status, rejected_reason, and evidence_path; no large Lean bodies copied
stale_rule: Reopen if route naming, W registry, or proof baseline changes
implementation_consumption: Four cache rows added to proof_search_cache; no proof integration

source_surface: target accepted_for_impl and worker inbox surfaces installed
question: Accepted-for-implementation surface and worker inbox rules were installed; implementation reads only accepted_for_impl.md or parent-named accepted rows.
expected_artifact: Issues/accepted_for_impl.md, Issues/worker_registry.tsv, Issues/inbox/README.md, and README consumption rules
acceptance_gate: Implementation can consume one short accepted row without reading worker logs; product_success remains false unless positive Lean witness exists
stale_rule: Reopen only if target Issues layout or implementation-role consumption rules change
implementation_consumption: Installed consumption boundary; no proof integration

question: Measure safe support-role concurrency from current WSL memory, swap, active Codex process count, and Lean build contention.
expected_artifact: result.json with recommended model-only worker cap, Lean-build semaphore, reserve memory, and ramp-up/ramp-down rules
acceptance_gate: Parent can set concurrency without guessing; does not claim a fixed always-on worker count
stale_rule: Stale when WSL memory, swap, active sessions, or target HEAD materially change
implementation_consumption: Governor uses cap before launching support workers
